page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.hfr6.10xlarge is a memory-optimized server instance powered by the KVM hypervisor. It features 40 dedicated physical cores and 40 vCPUs utilizing the x86_64 architecture, driven by an Intel Xeon 8269CY processor running at a baseline frequency of 3.1 GHz. The hardware configuration includes 384.0 GB of RAM, yielding a high resource density of 9.6 GB of memory per core. This instance does not include local storage or integrated GPUs, relying instead on network-attached storage options and a baseline network bandwidth of 12 Gbps.

Performance benchmarks place this instance in the average tier across multiple categories. In CPU-intensive tasks, it achieves a stress-ng multi-core score of 38,318.39 and a PassMark CPU score of 34,031.19. Memory performance is highlighted by a read-only small block cached bandwidth of 2,128.36 GB/sec, which drops to 111.38 GB/sec for uncached large blocks, alongside a PassMark memory score of 2,647.4. For database operations, the instance processes 32.74 million Redis SET operations per second and scores 14,328.81 on PassMark database tests.

The absence of local storage and dedicated GPU hardware represents a clear tradeoff, making this instance unsuitable for workloads requiring high-speed local disk I/O or hardware-accelerated graphics processing. However, the high memory-to-vCPU ratio provides qualitative cost efficiency for memory-bound workloads that do not require local NVMe drives. This profile is well-suited for in-memory databases, large-scale caching layers, enterprise application servers, and moderate data processing tasks.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.hfr6.10xlarge is a memory-optimized server instance featuring 40 dedicated vCPUs and 40 physical cores powered by an Intel Xeon 8269CY processor running at 3.1 GHz. Built on the x86_64 architecture and KVM hypervisor, it delivers 384.0 GB of RAM, providing a high memory-to-core ratio of 9.6 GB. The instance lacks local storage and GPU accelerators, relying on a baseline network bandwidth of 12 Gbps. Benchmark results demonstrate solid mid-tier performance, with a PassMark CPU score of 34,031.19 and 32.74 million Redis SET operations per second. This hardware profile is optimized for memory-intensive workloads such as in-memory databases, caching layers, and enterprise applications that require substantial memory capacity without the need for local NVMe storage or GPU acceleration.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.hfr6.10xlarge is a memory-optimized instance with 40 Intel Xeon vCPUs, 384 GB RAM, and 12 Gbps network bandwidth, designed for memory-intensive workloads and database operations.

tagline: A memory-optimized x86_64 server with dedicated Intel Xeon cores and high RAM density for memory-intensive enterprise workloads.

384.0 GB of system memory providing 9.6 GB per core
12 Gbps baseline network bandwidth with KVM virtualization
